text:
running: make install
port: www/seamonkey2
error message:
sed /usr/ports/www/seamonkey2/work/comm-1.9.1/mozilla/build/unix/*.pc - no such file or directory

Fix: 

the whole of the dir path mentioned in error message checks out okay
the contents of the dir path are mostly scripts (*.sh, *.pl)
there are no *.pc files
How-To-Repeat: run: make install
